entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: The crop Eleusine coracana (L.) Gaertn. studied for blast disease resistance.

entities.name: BLAST DISEASE
entities.description: A fungal disease that is a major constraint in finger millet production.

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of finger millet genotypes to withstand fungal blast disease.

entities.name: GENETIC POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The occurrence of two or more clearly different morphs or forms in the population of finger millet.

entities.name: SRAP
entities.description: Sequence-related amplified polymorphism used to assess genetic variations in finger millet.

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used to assess genetic variations and develop genotype-specific markers.

entities.name: UPGMA
entities.description: Unweighted pair-group method with arithmetic average used for clustering genotypes.

entities.name: IE 4709
entities.description: A blast-resistant genotype of finger millet.

entities.name: INDAF 7
entities.description: A blast-susceptible genotype of finger millet.

entities.name: NEI'S GENE DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A statistical measure used to reveal genetic diversity within and between genotypes.

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF MOLECULAR VARIANCE
entities.description: A method used to analyze the distribution of genetic diversity within and between genotypes.

entities.name: RESISTANCE BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at developing crop varieties with improved disease resistance.
